title: Use earthmoving and off-the-road tyre handlers
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Use earthmoving and off-the-road tyre handlers demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Check tyre handler and work site for suitability

pcs.text: Select work site for operations according to workplace procedures 1.2 Check work area for obstructions and proximity to vehicles and equipment1.3 Erect barriers and warning signs in areas where there may be passing traffic1.4 Select specialist equipment and tools according to job requirements and workplace procedures1.5 Inspect tyre handler for serviceability and compliance with relevant Australian standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select work site for operations according to workplace procedures 1.2 Check work area for obstructions and proximity to vehicles and equipment1.3 Erect barriers and warning signs in areas where there may be passing traffic1.4 Select specialist equipment and tools according to job requirements and workplace procedures1.5 Inspect tyre handler for serviceability and compliance with relevant Australian standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select work site for operations according to workplace procedures 1.2 Check work area for obstructions and proximity to vehicles and equipment1.3 Erect barriers and warning signs in areas where there may be passing traffic1.4 Select specialist equipment and tools according to job requirements and workplace procedures1.5 Inspect tyre handler for serviceability and compliance with relevant Australian standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Check tyre handler and work site for suitability

elements.title: Operate tyre handling equipment

pcs.text: Conduct tyre handler pre-operational checks, and identify and address operating hazards 2.2 Operate tyre handler, specialist equipment and tools within safe working limits to maximise efficiency of operations2.3 Handle tyres, wheels and rim assemblies according to workplace procedures, manufacturer handling recommendations, and Australian standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct tyre handler pre-operational checks, and identify and address operating hazards 2.2 Operate tyre handler, specialist equipment and tools within safe working limits to maximise efficiency of operations2.3 Handle tyres, wheels and rim assemblies according to workplace procedures, manufacturer handling recommendations, and Australian standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct tyre handler pre-operational checks, and identify and address operating hazards 2.2 Operate tyre handler, specialist equipment and tools within safe working limits to maximise efficiency of operations2.3 Handle tyres, wheels and rim assemblies according to workplace procedures, manufacturer handling recommendations, and Australian standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Operate tyre handling equipment

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Remove and store barriers and warning signs 3.2 Return tyre handler, and specialist equipment and tools to appropriate storage or parking area3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures and report any damage or faults
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove and store barriers and warning signs 3.2 Return tyre handler, and specialist equipment and tools to appropriate storage or parking area3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures and report any damage or faults?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove and store barriers and warning signs 3.2 Return tyre handler, and specialist equipment and tools to appropriate storage or parking area3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures and report any damage or faults.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
